comment.body:
in my teenager times and in my 20s i liked to create logic puzzles... hard ones, mostly cryptographic ones. 
i had more than a hundred... and when i met someone, i kindly and jokingly showed her my puzzles, if she can solve them or not... but in my mind, i was seriously testing them if i can respect her mental talent or not ... :D
